author: cteplovs
description: Renders .ipynb Jupyter notebook files with syntax-highlighted code cells, formatted markdown, and inline outputs. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: cteplovs
manifest.description: Renders .ipynb Jupyter notebook files with syntax-highlighted code cells, formatted markdown, and inline outputs.
manifest.name: Jupyter Notebook Viewer

name: Jupyter Notebook Viewer

releases.author: cteplovs
releases.description:
Initial release.

Renders `.ipynb` files natively inside Obsidian:
- Markdown cells rendered with Obsidian's own renderer (wikilinks, formatting)
- Code cells with Python syntax highlighting and execution-count badges
- Stream output, HTML tables (pandas/polars), error tracebacks
- Theme-aware — works in light and dark mode
releases.name: Jupyter Notebook Viewer 1.0.0
